title: Creative Mines
description: My April Fools' 2025 mod / FlashFest submission adding commands (and enabling the debug command) for this year's quirks
body:
This adds one base command: `/af25`. It has a few subcommands:
- `level`: A copy of the enabled-with-this-mod `/level` command allowing you to craft your mines
- `unlock`: Unlocks various things. Each of these has an `all` selector to unlock all.
  - `world_effect`: The world effects (the things you can customize about each mine)
  - `special_mine`: A special mine (with preset special world effects)
  - `player_ability`: Player unlocks (those which you find with the menu under U or the inventory). This has an optional extra parameter (defaulting to false) which if true will also unlock the "hard-knock" entries (bonus extra challenges)

This also re-enables creative mode in the world select screen.
